insight: Forge/NeoForge hybrids (Arclight, Mohist Youer) drop incoming BungeeCord-channel plugin messages to Bukkit PluginMessageListeners while outgoing works, making proxy chat one-directional (hybrid→Paper arrives, Paper→hybrid never) and breaking network player sync on the hybrid. Fingerprint: VelocityControl debug shows forwarding but the hybrid backend logs nothing. Platform bug (see #3415, IzzelAliz/Arclight#2100), redirect to the hybrid's tracker.
